nasb.text: Then the men of the city said to Joash, “Bring out your son, that he may die, for he has torn down the altar of Baal, and indeed, he has cut down the Asherah which was beside it.”

esv.text: Then the men of the town said to Joash, “Bring out your son, that he may die, for he has broken down the altar of Baal and cut down the Asherah beside it.”

cnv.text: 城裡的人對約阿施說：“把你的兒子領出來，把他處死，因為他拆毀了巴力的祭壇，砍下了壇旁的亞舍拉。”

ccb.text: 便对约阿施说：“把你儿子交出来！他拆毁了巴力的祭坛，砍倒了坛旁的亚舍拉神像，我们要处死他！”
